docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUALA, PACIFICO V DBA NEW FILIPINAS RESTAURANT $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT TUALA, PACIFICO V DBA NEW FILIPINAS RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
